description_long: This object consists of two thick, hardbound books stacked neatly on top of each other, secured by a wide brown strap running vertically across their covers. The covers are a deep, dark color with large, textured green panels and black corner accents, giving them a vintage or antique appearance. The edges of the pages are visible and appear slightly yellowed, suggesting age or high-quality paper. The spines feature two gold bands, adding a touch of decorative detail. The books are substantial in size and thickness, indicating they may be reference volumes or special editions. There are no visible illustrations or artwork on the covers, only subtle text and color blocking.
description: Two thick, vintage-style hardbound books stacked and secured with a brown strap, featuring dark covers with green panels and gold spine accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stacked books' page edges and the green and black cover design with the brown strap across the top.
description_view_1: Spine view highlighting the gold bands on the spines and the brown strap running vertically down the center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the page edges and the continuation of the green and black cover design.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full extent of the green and black cover panels and the brown strap securing both books.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark brown with two horizontal gold bands near the top and bottom. No visible text or additional decorative elements are present.
